     it becomes the squash-merge commit on main and drives the release. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is a valid [Conventional Commit](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Docs updated where needed (`docs/arc42/`, `docs/adr/`, README/CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] CI is green (PR-title lint, docs link/anchor check, project checks)
- [ ] No secrets or real/sensitive data added
